name: Low-Calorie "Fried" Squash or Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons low calorie Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 medium yellow summer squash OR zucchini OR medium eggplant.
2. Cut the squash or zucchini into 1/4-inch slices. Place in a plastic bag, add the Italian dressing and shake to coat thoroughly.
3. Into a separate plastic bag, place the cheese and bread crumbs. Add the coated vegetable slices, close the bag, and shake to coat.
4. Using a non-stick pan sprayed with cooking spray, add the vegetables in a single layer. Bake at 450 degrees for 5-7 minutes, just until tender-crisp.
5. If using eggplant, slice into 3/4-inch thick slices. Moisten with the Italian dressing, and roll in the cheese-bread crumb mixture. Bake for 5-6 minutes at 475 degrees, turn and bake other side for about 5 more minutes.
